Many of those cases would be cured promptly by Bromium . But where it is thought of by the routine prescriber is where there is croup or diphtheria. That was never taught by Hahnemann . "Much rattling of mucus in the larynx. Inspiration very difficult. Larynx drawn down." This would take place in croup, after the formation of the membrane. "Cough hoarse, crowing, suffocative; breathing sawing, whistling. Spasms of the larynx; suffocative cough. Membranous formation in larynx and trachea. Croupous inflammation formed by exuberant growth of fungi." "Asthma of sailors as soon as they go ashore;" relieved again as soon as they are at sea. Difficult breathing with rattling throughout the chest. Bronchitis and pneumonia. Bromium is often the remedy when whooping cough is prevailing in the spring, towards the hot weather, and membranes form in the larynx. The cough gets immediately worse from dust. Handling old books from the shelf aggravates. Sneezing, hoarseness, irritation in the respiratory tract from picking up and handling dusty things. "Cough, with sudden paroxysms of suffocation on swallowing." Bromium is full of catarrhal conditions, especially of the breathing apparatus. It has hepatization of the lungs; infiltration is one of its most natural features. Copyright © Robert Séror 2000 Mise en page Copyright © Sylvain Cazalet 2000

eyes.text: Lachrymation (r.) with swelling of tear-gland. Darting through eye (l.). Dilated pupils. Flashes before eyes. Protruded eyes.

Flashes of light. Sensitiveness to bright light. A grey point before right eye, moving up and down with movement of eye. Dilatation of pupils. Darting through left eye. Throbbing stitches in left upper lid, extending to brow, forehead and left temple ; < by external pressure, motion and stooping ; > by rest ; pain unfits him for work. Lachrymation of right eye, with swelling of lachrymal gland. θ Fistula lachrymalis. Protruding eyes.

ears.text: Noise in ears. Swelling and hardness of (l.) parotid gland; feeling warm to the touch. Suppuration of l. parotid, edges of the opening smooth; discharge watery and excoriating; swelling remaining hard and unyielding; after scarlatina.

Noise in ears, like a distant rushing. Ringing in right ear. Stitches in ear. Throbbing and burning in ears, may be succeeded by burning through whole body. Discharge from ears. Parotids, mostly left, affected. θ After scarlatina. Swelling and hardness of left parotid gland, swelling feeling warm to touch. θ Sequel to scarlatina. Suppuration of left parotid, edges of opening smooth ; discharge watery and excoriating ; swelling remaining hard and unyielding. θ After scarlatina. See 44.

face.text: Greyish, earthy complexion; old appearance. Pale. Heat in cheek, first r., later l. Sensation of cobweb. Strong, hard swelling of glands, esp. on lower jaw and throat.

Cancerous ulcer between right eye and ear, of size of palm of a child's hand. Sensation as of spider web on face. Face : pale, or red, or alternating. Face of a bluish tinge, turning purplish at each effort to cough. θ Croup. Grey ; earthy color of face ; oldish appearance. θ Cancer of mamma. Face ashy grey. θ Diphtheria. Cheeks sunken. θ Diphtheria. Heat in cheeks ; first in right, later in left. Heat of face and head. θ Spasm of glottis. Pale, collapsed face. θ Croup. Shooting pain on vermilion border of upper lip ; afterwards yellow spots, which open and discharge a yellow fluid. Boring pain going to right, or on right side of lower jaw. Slight swelling of articulation of left jaw, with cracking in it when chewing ; swelling and hardness of left parotid, which is warm to touch ; rosy-red swelling of tonsils and difficult swallowing ; tension and pressure when swallowing and when not ; pain in throat is especially < when swallowing fluids ; hawking up mucus. Left submaxillary gland swollen to size of a small hen's egg, hard, not sore to pressure ; neighboring glands more or less similarly affected. Stony, hard swelling of glands, especially on lower jaw and throat.

stool_rectum.text: Diarrhœa, stools yellow, green, black; after every meal. Hæmorrhoids, blind, painful, during and after stool from application of cold or warm water; > wetting with saliva; (with black diarrhœic stools). Intensely painful hæmorrhoids.

Croup of colon. Black, fecal stools. Yellow, green or blackish diarrhœa. Stools : bright yellow, preceded by cutting and rumbling in abdomen ; light yellow, slimy mucus ; painless, odorless, like scrapings from intestines. Diarrhœa after every meal ceases, but returns after oysters. Diarrhœa : after every meal ; at night. Constipation : stool hard, tough, brown and glistening ; breaks to pieces like sheep-dung. Before stool : rumbling and cutting pain in abdomen. During stool : much flatus ; painful hemorrhoids ; pressing in stomach and abdomen. Blind, painful hemorrhoids during and after stool ; < from cold or warm water ; > from wetting with saliva. Blind, intensely painful varices, with black, diarrheic stools. Varices < from application of cold and warm water. θ Diarrhœa.

chest_heart.text: Stitches in r. side of chest. R. lung most affected. Stitch (inflammation of lungs r. side). Sensation of weakness in chest. Tightness (asthma); at night; in sailors when they come ashore. Violent palpitation lying l. side; (hypertrophy).

Sensation of constriction impedes respiration, with dry, tickling cough. Stitches in upper part of chest. Stitches in chest ; inflammation of lungs, right side. θ Croup. θ Diphtheria. Affections begin with bronchi and ascend to larynx. Sensation of weakness and exhaustion in chest. Pressure in upper part of chest. Sharp stitches in right side of chest, especially when walking rapidly. Sticking pain in left side of chest towards arm. Cutting pains running upward. θ Phthisis. Right lung most affected. Paralytic drawing pain through left chest, towards scapula and into left arm. Hepatization of lower lobes. θ Pneumonia. After much cough with loose, bluish, granular expectoration, attacks of dyspnœa for several days, breathing difficult, laborious, short ; cough becomes dry ; in region of stomach, pressure and tension ; breathing noisy ; skin bluish, especially on hands, asthma forces her to sit up in night ; sensation of being beaten all over. θ Emphysema. Anxious feeling about heart. θ Mental derangement. Violent palpitation of heart ; she cannot lie on right side. Unbearable, violent cutting, left side under last ribs, from below upward, as if it would kill her ; old woman. θ Ossification of valves. Violent cardiac pain and palpitation, with headache deep in under crown of head ; lameness of left arm. Violent palpitation of heart in evening, so that she cannot lie on left side. Cutting pains running upward. θ Heart disease. Pulse very soft. θ Diphtheria. Accelerated pulse. Pulse small, weak, not countable. θ Croup. Tearing in left clavicle. Pressure below left clavicle. Pressure in sternum.

back.text: Neck stiff. Glands of neck much swollen. Goître. Two encysted tumours on both sides of the neck. Aching at inner border l. scapula up to neck, on moving l. arm, or sitting leaning to l. Boring in spinous processes of different vertebræ.

Forcing pain in temples and neck, obliged to press neck to obtain relief. θ Eczema. Stiffness of neck ; in morning. The left side of neck is stiff and painful. A goitre, already increased to size of a hen's egg, with a girl, æt. 14, who had menstruated one year, blonde, lively temperament, delicate constitution, disappeared within 16 weeks ; 30th in water, twice a day. An obstinate goitre, not changed by Iodium in substance, disappeared after Brom. 30th, in water, twice daily for three months. Glands of neck much swollen. θ Eczema. Two encysted tumors on both sides of neck. Aching pain at inner border of left scapula up to neck, on moving left arm or sitting leaning to left. Boring in spinous processes of different vertebræ. Wandering, pressive pain in dorsal muscles below scapulæ. Tearing in right lumbar and dorsal muscles ; < by moving these parts. Sore pain in small of back, unchanged by motion.

fever_chill.text: Pulse much accelerated. Chill every other day with shaking, yawning, and stretching; with cold feet. Skin cool, covered with viscous sweat. Sweat on palms. Perspiration from the least exertion. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.

Chill on alternate days, with cold feet. Chill every other day, shaking, yawning and stretching. Hands cold and moist. Chilliness with shuddering. Violent shivering with yawning and stretching ; head confused ; drawing in left tibia down to ankle, whereby foot becomes quite cold ; this is repeated every other day, as a chilliness with cold feet. Skin cool, covered with viscous sweat. θ Croup. Internal burning heat, like between skin and flesh. Sweat on palms. Sweat from least exertion or exercise.

urinary.text: Continued desire to urinate, with tickling sensation in tip of urethra. Frequent urination. High-colored urine. θ Eczema. Urine : scanty and dark ; turbid, and deposits a whitish sediment adhering to vessel ; leaves a red coating on vessel ; contains large flakes of white mucus, like jelly. Dribbling of urine, with burning after urinating.

extremities.text: Severe, rheumatic, dull, constrictive pain in right shoulder and thence into arm, while walking in open air. Stitches in right shoulder, axilla or elbow. Great restlessness and jactitation of arms. Left arm feels paralyzed. Weakness of arms. Tearing in arms, especially in hands and fingers. Icy cold forearms or only cold hands. Eruption on right elbow. θ Eczema. Icy cold forearms. θ Diarrhœa. Hands cold and moist. Cold hands. θ Diarrhœa. Boils on arms. (In sick :) Profuse, moist eruption in armpits and perineum. θ Eczema. Drawing pain through left breast into left arm. Pain in left knee and hip. Pressive bone pain in left leg. Weakness of left leg. Paralytic sensation in right leg. Pain in both knee joints. Pressive pain in right knee, like in bone. Boring pains in one, or both tibiæ. When stepping, violent pain in middle of ball of left foot, as if one had stepped on a hard body, with paralyzed sensation in knee joint, and somewhat in hip. Pressure and pains in feet and toes. Great stiffness in all the limbs at 11 A. M., better in afternoon. Pains in limbs, alternating with chilliness and heat. Lameness in all joints, left side.
